§6Hard Plastic/PVC Bars§f are processed plastic materials for industrial use.

§eObtaining:§f
• Chemical processing from petroleum products
• Industrial Mixer recipes

• Durable plastic components
• Industrial machine parts
• Chemical-resistant applications

§aTip:§f Useful for recipes requiring durable plastic materials.
